meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Advanced User Onboarding for Freelancers: Scale Your SaaS
content.seo_description: Master user onboarding to solve churn. Learn how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade onboarding flows that impress clients.
content.answer_block: Stop building static apps that confuse users. Implement high-velocity, data-driven onboarding flows using Antigravity for UI architecture and Claude Code for automated logic implementation. By guiding users to their 'Aha!' moment within seconds, you increase retention, justify higher freelance rates, and transform basic prototypes into enterprise-grade SaaS products.
content.intro:
You’ve built the core feature, but your users are dropping off before they ever see the value. It’s the silent killer of freelance projects: the gap between 'app installed' and 'problem solved.' Clients don't pay for code; they pay for outcomes, and if your users are lost in a maze of empty states, your reputation as a developer is at risk.

We are moving beyond basic modals. This guide leverages the raw speed of Antigravity and the cognitive power of Claude Code to ship sophisticated, context-aware onboarding flows. By the time you finish this, you won't just be a developer—you'll be an architect of user success, shipping features that stick.

steps.title: Map the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Define the single action that delivers immediate value. We use this to prune unnecessary UI steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this SaaS codebase and map the shortest path from sign-up to the primary value proposition. Identify friction points in the current onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Identify the top 3 friction points in user_onboarding_flow.tsx and suggest a minimal path to the core feature.'

steps.title: Architect the State Machine
steps.description: Use a state machine to manage onboarding progress, ensuring users never get stuck in inconsistent states.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust state machine schema for a 4-step onboarding process, including error handling and 'skip' functionality.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create a state machine using XState for the onboarding flow, ensuring persistence across sessions.'

steps.title: Implement Context-Aware Tooltips
steps.description: Dynamic tooltips that only trigger based on actual user interaction, not arbitrary timers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable Tooltip component that tracks user progress and triggers only when the user reaches the relevant DOM element.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Implement a dynamic tooltip controller that observes user interaction with core features.'

steps.title: Integrate Progress Analytics
steps.description: Hook into your telemetry to identify where users abandon the onboarding process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Inject analytics tracking events at each step of the onboarding flow to measure drop-off rates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add PostHog tracking events to every stage of the onboarding state machine.'

steps.title: Automated Testing for Onboarding
steps.description: Ensure the flow never breaks by automating user journeys.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Playwright tests that simulate a new user completing the entire onboarding flow from start to finish.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Generate and run E2E tests for the onboarding flow using Playwright.'

pro_tips: Always use a 'Skip' button. Forcing users through a tutorial is the fastest way to drive them to your competitor.
Show progress bars that are slightly 'pre-filled'. Psychological momentum keeps users clicking forward.
Use 'Empty States' as educational opportunities. Never show a blank screen; show a 'Get Started' CTA instead.
Personalize the onboarding by asking one high-intent question during the signup flow to tailor the dashboard.
Performance is an onboarding feature. If your onboarding bundle is over 50kb, you are losing users to latency.
content.next_steps: Deploy your new onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a user session recording tool like LogRocket, and iterate based on real-world behavior.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop churn and start scaling. Don't let your code sit in a repo—put it in the hands of users who will love it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
